title: I... Gave Away my Tears
overview: While at home, Shinichiro Nakagami laments how he cannot express his feelings for Hiromi Yuasa.

title: What... Do I Want to Do?
overview: After insisting Shinichiro should believe her about giving her away her tears, Noe tells him of her mission to retrieve them.

title: What About What We Talked About?
overview: When Shinichiro goes to school, he finds red seeds in pink envelopes which Noe has placed in his locker, desk, and around the classroom.

title: Okay, Blink
overview: While walking back to Shinichiro's house, Hiromi tells him about her crush on Noe's brother, which hurts Shinichiro.

title: Nosy Boys are Annoying
overview: Shinichiro looks for Noe during school, but after she suggests they eat lunch together or go home together, he becomes defensive and lies, telling her that he has dance practice after school and that she should eat with her friends instead of him.

title: Is... That a Joke?
overview: Aiko tries to tell Shinichiro her feelings but is interrupted when Miyokichi arrives.

title: Say it Clearly, Write it Here
overview: Noe once again tries to approach Shinichiro at school, but he shrugs her off, telling her that she does not understand his situation.

title: A Town With No Snow
overview: After asking Noe out, Shinichiro tells her about his picture book that he is making about the rooster Raigoumaru.

title: Can't Quite Seem to Fly
overview: Jun and Hiromi crash while on the motorcycle, but they are not harmed. As a result of the accident, both Jun and Hiromi get suspended from school.

title: I'll Do Everything Right
overview: Shinichiro hears from Miyokichi that he broke up with Aiko, even though he did not want to accept it at first.

title: It's Not Me Whom You Love
overview: It has been a week since Hiromi moved out and in the meantime has settled into single living. Miyokichi gets a call from Aiko, and the two decide to start over from the beginning as friends.

title: From My Unseeing Eyes...
overview: After Shinichiro listens to Noe talk to herself at the beach, he goes home but is unable to sleep due to her words.

title: Your Tears
overview: The day after the festival, Shinichiro goes to Jun to apologize for Noe's broken leg, though Jun says he will not forgive him.
